summary: Completed comprehensive testing of About page functionality and React Router navigation. About page renders perfectly with all sections (hero, experiences, founder's story, stats, contact info, CTA, FAQ). Backend APIs remain fully functional. Navigation issue identified with promo banner blocking navbar clicks.

ui_bugs.issue: Promo banner intercepts clicks on navbar About Us link, preventing navigation
ui_bugs.workaround: Direct URL navigation works, footer About Us link works

passed_tests: Backend APIs: GET /api/tours, POST /api/leads, GET /api/leads (100% success rate)
About page direct load at /about URL
About page hero section with 'About Holiday Emporium' title
4 travel experience cards (Spiritual Tours, Wildlife Adventures, Hill Stations, International Tours) with EXPLORE TOUR links
Founder's Story section with Est. 1990 badge and narrative
Why Travel With Us section with 35+, 100+, 50K+ stats
Contact info strip with Email, Phone, Office, FAQ icons
CTA banner 'We'd Love to Hear From You' with Explore Tours button
Navigation: Home link from About page returns to home
Navigation: Footer About Us link navigates to /about page
Navigation: Contact link from About page navigates to home #contact section
Navigation: Experience card CTAs navigate to home page
Navigation: CTA banner button navigates to home page
Home page: All existing sections render correctly (no regression)
Home page: Contact form fields working
Home page: Navbar links (Tours, Packages) clickable
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix promo banner z-index issue preventing navbar About Us link clicks. The promo banner (z-index 60) is intercepting clicks on the navbar About Us link. Consider reducing promo banner z-index or adjusting navbar positioning.
